Class ColumnRepository

java.lang.Object
domain.ColumnRepository
public class ColumnRepository extends Object
Manages the collection of columns in a table and notifies observers about changes.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ColumnRepository()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addObserver(ColumnRepositoryObserver observer)
    Registers an observer to be notified when a column changes.
    boolean
    allowsBlanks(int colIndex)
    Returns whether blanks are allowed in the column at the specified index.
    Column
    createNewColumn()
    Creates a new column with a unique name and adds it to the list.
    List<Column>
    getColumns()
    Returns the list of columns in this repository.
    ColumnType
    getType(int colIndex)
    Returns the type of the column at the specified index.
    void
    remove(Column column)
    Removes the given column from the repository and notifies observers.
    void
    removeObserver(ColumnRepositoryObserver observer)
    Unregisters a previously registered observer.
    void
    rename(Column column, String name)
    Renames the given column and notifies observers.
    void
    setType(Column column, ColumnType newType)
    Updates the type of a column and notifies all observers.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Constructor Details

    • ColumnRepository

      public ColumnRepository()

  • Method Details

    • addObserver

      public void addObserver(ColumnRepositoryObserver observer)
      Registers an observer to be notified when a column changes.
      Parameters:
      observer - the observer to add, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if observer is null

    • removeObserver

      public void removeObserver(ColumnRepositoryObserver observer)
      Unregisters a previously registered observer.
      Parameters:
      observer - the observer to remove, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if observer is null

    • createNewColumn

      public Column createNewColumn()
      Creates a new column with a unique name and adds it to the list.
      Returns:
      the newly created column

    • getColumns

      public List<Column> getColumns()
      Returns the list of columns in this repository.
      Returns:
      the list of columns

    • rename

      public void rename(Column column, String name)
      Renames the given column and notifies observers.
      Parameters:
      column - the column to rename, must not be null
      name - the new name to set, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if column or name is null

    • remove

      public void remove(Column column)
      Removes the given column from the repository and notifies observers.
      Parameters:
      column - the column to remove, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if column is null

    • getType

      public ColumnType getType(int colIndex)
      Returns the type of the column at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      colIndex - the column index
      Returns:
      the column type

    • allowsBlanks

      public boolean allowsBlanks(int colIndex)
      Returns whether blanks are allowed in the column at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      colIndex - the column index
      Returns:
      true if blanks are allowed, false otherwise

    • setType

      public void setType(Column column, ColumnType newType)
      Updates the type of a column and notifies all observers.
      Parameters:
      column - the column to update
      newType - the new type to assign
